title: 14th Annual Breast Cancer Charity Music Festival
description: Our flagship annual event featuring live music, food, raffles, games, rides, and a carnival — all in the fight against breast cancer. Family friendly!

title: Paint Night Fundraiser
description: An evening of creativity and community! Join us for a guided paint night where all proceeds go toward breast cancer awareness and support.

title: Charity Golf Outing
description: Hit the links for a cause! Our annual charity golf outing brings together golfers of all skill levels for a day of fun and fundraising.

title: Toys for Shots & Local Food Drive
location: Comiskey Park Bar, 485 Lake Ave, St James, NY 11780
description: Partnering with Toys for Tots and St. Philip and James Roman Catholic Church to bring joy and food to families in need.
